desc.zh: 进入武汉科技大学人工智能科创专业，开启大学生活
desc.en: Started at WUST, AI Innovation program

desc.zh: 从零学习 Python：基础语法、数据结构、简单项目
desc.en: Learned Python from scratch: syntax, data structures, mini projects

desc.zh: 代表学院参加新生杯足球赛，扫荡型中场，获得二等奖
desc.en: Represented the college in the freshman football cup, box-to-box midfielder, won 2nd place

desc.zh: 通过选拔加入机器人团队，开始学习嵌入式系统与机器人控制
desc.en: Joined the robotics team, started learning embedded systems and robot control

desc.zh: 开始系统关注大模型进展，学习 Transformer 原理与 AI 工具链
desc.en: Started following LLM developments, learning Transformer architecture and AI toolchain

desc.zh: 使用 Claude Code 等 AI 工具高效开发，搭建本个人主页
desc.en: Learned AI-assisted development with Claude Code, built this portfolio

desc.zh: 报名学习大模型部署微调课程，动手实践 LoRA 微调
desc.en: Enrolled in LLM deployment & fine-tuning course, hands-on LoRA practice

desc.zh: 开始学习 PyTorch 深度学习框架，为模型训练打基础
desc.en: Beginning PyTorch deep learning framework for model training
